## 🎟️ Ticket Scope & Complexity
**`[Ticket ID / Feature] | [Complexity L1-L5] | [Zero-Cost & Modular: Y/N] | [Current Revert Hash]`**

## 🏗️ Architecture-First Context
**Is this zero-cost and modular?**
> (Explain how this feature fits into the existing microservices without adding bloat or unneeded dependencies.)

**What is the intended outcome?**
> (Describe the feature. Remember: Security-by-Default and Cognitive Ease are mandatory.)

## 🛑 The Hard-Stop Check
- [ ] Will building this require modifying more than 2 files simultaneously? 
*(If yes, ensure this is broken down into smaller L1/L2 tickets or get Lead Architect approval.)*

## 🎨 UI/UX Component Isolation
*(If a new UI view is needed, describe the visual styling in plain English first. Do not provide CSS/Tailwind until approved.)*
